Survey_Type: Specifies whether the survey was conducted internally (with employees) or externally (with the general public)
Survey_Period: The quarter and year in which the survey was conducted
Company: The name of the company being assessed in the survey
Question: The question asked in the survey. In this case, it pertains to the perception of the company's ethics
Yes_Response_Percentage: The percentage of respondents who agreed with the question statement
